use rayon::prelude::*;
use std::collections::BTreeMap;
use std::sync::Mutex;

// BAD: Mutex<BTreeMap> to preserve ordering in parallel output
fn process_ordered(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<(usize, Output)> {
    let results = Mutex::new(BTreeMap::new());

    items.par_iter().enumerate().for_each(|(i, item)| {
        let output = process(item);
        results.lock().unwrap().insert(i, output);
    });

    results.into_inner().unwrap().into_iter().collect()
}

fn rank_documents(docs: &[Document]) -> Vec<(usize, Score)> {
    let scores = Mutex::new(Vec::new());

    docs.par_iter().enumerate().for_each(|(i, doc)| {
        let score = compute_score(doc);
        scores.lock().unwrap().push((i, score));
    });

    let mut results = scores.into_inner().unwrap();
    results.sort_by_key(|&(i, _)| i);
    results
}
